Interface ProjectRepository

All Known Implementing Classes:
ProjectRepositoryImpl
public interface ProjectRepository
Repository interface for Project entity operations. Provides methods for project creation, retrieval, update, and deletion.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    delete(Project project)
    Deletes a project from the database.
    LiveData<List<Project>>
    getActiveByUserId(long userId)
    Retrieves all non-deleted projects for a specific user.
    LiveData<List<Project>>
    getAllByUserId(long userId)
    Retrieves all projects for a specific user.
    LiveData<Project>
    getById(long id)
    Retrieves a project by its unique identifier.
    CompletableFuture<Project>
    save(Project project)
    Saves or updates a project in the database.

  • Method Details

    • save

      CompletableFuture<Project> save(Project project)
      Saves or updates a project in the database.
      Parameters:
      project - Project entity to save.
      Returns:
      CompletableFuture containing the saved Project with generated ID.

    • getById

      LiveData<Project> getById(long id)
      Retrieves a project by its unique identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - Project ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the Project, or null if not found.

    • getAllByUserId

      LiveData<List<Project>> getAllByUserId(long userId)
      Retrieves all projects for a specific user.
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of Projects.

    • getActiveByUserId

      LiveData<List<Project>> getActiveByUserId(long userId)
      Retrieves all non-deleted projects for a specific user.
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of Projects.

    • delete

      CompletableFuture<Void> delete(Project project)
      Deletes a project from the database.
      Parameters:
      project - Project entity to delete.
      Returns:
      CompletableFuture that completes when deletion is finished.
